title: not a pretty sight ...
content:
actually, it's kinda freaky. see .. during my routine survey around the backyard, i came across this  **dead cat** . need to go get someone to take care of that poor cat already.

no, i don't get freak out by a dead animal. but it's not a pretty sight at all!

and no, i'll not take care of the cat by myself. the evidence around the crime scene suggests that the cat has been there for more than 36 hours - no sign of struggle, though. ... (you got the picture).

by the way,  __ewwwww+__
